independent_tests.test_output_summary:
Result:
tests/cli/test_init.py::TestInitGracefulDegradation::test_init_graceful_degradation_graphiti_unavailable PASSED [  3%]
tests/cli/test_init.py::TestInitGracefulDegradation::test_init_handles_graphiti_connection_error PASSED [  3%]
tests/cli/test_init.py::TestInitSkipGraphitiFlag::test_init_skip_graphiti_flag PASSED [  4%]

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `guardkit init fastapi-python` calls `sync_template_to_graphiti()` when Graphiti is available
criteria_verification.evidence: Added import of sync_template_to_graphiti in guardkit/cli/init.py and wired Step 2.5 in _cmd_init() that calls sync_template_to_graphiti(template_source) after Graphiti client is initialized and enabled. Test test_init_calls_sync_template_when_graphiti_available verifies this.
criteria_verification.notes: Added import of sync_template_to_graphiti in guardkit/cli/init.py and wired Step 2.5 in _cmd_init() that calls sync_template_to_graphiti(template_source) after Graphiti client is initialized and enabled. Test test_init_calls_sync_template_when_graphiti_available verifies this.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Template manifest metadata appears in Graphiti after init
criteria_verification.evidence: sync_template_to_graphiti() syncs manifest metadata (name, language, frameworks, patterns, tags, complexity) via add_episode() to 'templates' group. Test test_sync_template_episode_body_contains_metadata verifies body contains expected fields.
criteria_verification.notes: sync_template_to_graphiti() syncs manifest metadata (name, language, frameworks, patterns, tags, complexity) via add_episode() to 'templates' group. Test test_sync_template_episode_body_contains_metadata verifies body contains expected fields.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Template agent metadata appears in Graphiti after init
criteria_verification.evidence: sync_agent_to_graphiti() syncs agent metadata including body_content to 'agents' group. sync_template_to_graphiti() now checks both agents/ and .claude/agents/ directories. Tests: test_sync_agent_to_graphiti, test_sync_template_includes_agents, test_sync_template_checks_dotclaude_agents.
criteria_verification.notes: sync_agent_to_graphiti() syncs agent metadata including body_content to 'agents' group. sync_template_to_graphiti() now checks both agents/ and .claude/agents/ directories. Tests: test_sync_agent_to_graphiti, test_sync_template_includes_agents, test_sync_template_checks_dotclaude_agents.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Template rule content appears in Graphiti after init
criteria_verification.evidence: sync_rule_to_graphiti() syncs rule content to 'rules' group. sync_template_to_graphiti() iterates .claude/rules/**/*.md and syncs each. Tests: test_sync_rule_to_graphiti, test_sync_template_includes_rules.
criteria_verification.notes: sync_rule_to_graphiti() syncs rule content to 'rules' group. sync_template_to_graphiti() iterates .claude/rules/**/*.md and syncs each. Tests: test_sync_rule_to_graphiti, test_sync_template_includes_rules.

criteria_verification.evidence: Step 2.5 (template sync) is inside the 'else' branch of 'if skip_graphiti:', so when --skip-graphiti is set, the entire Graphiti section including template sync is skipped. Test test_init_skip_graphiti_skips_template_sync verifies sync_template_to_graphiti is not called.
criteria_verification.notes: Step 2.5 (template sync) is inside the 'else' branch of 'if skip_graphiti:', so when --skip-graphiti is set, the entire Graphiti section including template sync is skipped. Test test_init_skip_graphiti_skips_template_sync verifies sync_template_to_graphiti is not called.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Graphiti unavailable: template files still copied, sync skipped with warning
criteria_verification.evidence: Template files are copied in Step 1 (apply_template) before any Graphiti operations. Step 2.5 only runs when Graphiti is initialized and enabled. If client.initialized returns False, the sync is skipped. Test test_init_graphiti_unavailable_skips_template_sync verifies this.
criteria_verification.notes: Template files are copied in Step 1 (apply_template) before any Graphiti operations. Step 2.5 only runs when Graphiti is initialized and enabled. If client.initialized returns False, the sync is skipped. Test test_init_graphiti_unavailable_skips_template_sync verifies this.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Template not found: sync skipped gracefully
criteria_verification.evidence: In Step 2.5, _resolve_template_source_dir(template) is called. If it returns None (template not found), sync is skipped with logger.info message. Test test_init_template_not_found_skips_sync verifies sync_template_to_graphiti is not called when template source is None.
criteria_verification.notes: In Step 2.5, _resolve_template_source_dir(template) is called. If it returns None (template not found), sync is skipped with logger.info message. Test test_init_template_not_found_skips_sync verifies sync_template_to_graphiti is not called when template source is None.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Rule content includes full text (not just 500-char preview)
criteria_verification.evidence: Added 'full_content' field to rule_body in sync_rule_to_graphiti() containing the complete rule content (main_content). Retained 'content_preview' for backwards compatibility. Test test_rule_sync_includes_full_content verifies full_content > 500 chars for long rules.
criteria_verification.notes: Added 'full_content' field to rule_body in sync_rule_to_graphiti() containing the complete rule content (main_content). Retained 'content_preview' for backwards compatibility. Test test_rule_sync_includes_full_content verifies full_content > 500 chars for long rules.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Agent sync includes body content beyond frontmatter
criteria_verification.evidence: Added _extract_body_content() helper and 'body_content' field to agent_body in sync_agent_to_graphiti(). This includes the full markdown body after frontmatter. Test test_agent_sync_includes_body_content verifies body_content contains sections like 'Responsibilities' and 'SOLID principles'.
criteria_verification.notes: Added _extract_body_content() helper and 'body_content' field to agent_body in sync_agent_to_graphiti(). This includes the full markdown body after frontmatter. Test test_agent_sync_includes_body_content verifies body_content contains sections like 'Responsibilities' and 'SOLID principles'.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Unit tests cover: successful sync, Graphiti unavailable, template not found
criteria_verification.evidence: 105 tests pass (2 integration tests skipped). New tests added: TestFullContentIngestion (3 tests), TestTemplateSyncWithoutManifest (3 tests), TestAgentDirectoryResolution (2 tests), TestInitCallsTemplateSyncToGraphiti (5 tests covering successful sync, skip-graphiti, graphiti unavailable, sync failure, template not found).
criteria_verification.notes: 105 tests pass (2 integration tests skipped).
